highlights.title: High-Torque 3500W Motor
highlights.description: Delivers instant torque for smooth city acceleration and confident highway cruising without breaking a sweat.

highlights.title: 65-70 KM Real-World Range
highlights.description: The 60V 27Ah lithium pack keeps you riding through the full day on a single overnight charge.

highlights.title: Ride Modes
highlights.description: Switch between Eco, City, and Sport modes to balance range and performance based on your ride.

features.tag: USER-FRIENDLY INTERFACE | REAL-TIME RIDING DATA | EFFORTLESS OPERATION
features.title: Upgraded LED Display — Simple, Smart, Easy to Control
features.description: Features an upgraded LED display with a clean, easy-to-operate interface, giving you instant access to speed, battery level, mileage, PAS mode, and more. Clear, bright, and intuitive — ride confidently with all essential info at a glance, day or night.

features.title: 60V 27Ah Battery Built for the Long Haul
features.description: The removable lithium pack slides out in seconds for indoor charging. A full charge in 6-8 hours gives you 55+ miles of real-world range, whether you're commuting or hitting trails.

features.title: 20" × 4" Fat Tires That Go Anywhere
features.description: Wide all-terrain tires absorb shocks on gravel, mud, and cracked pavement. The extra volume means a naturally cushioned ride even without full suspension.

highlights.title: High Efficiency Motor
highlights.description: The 3000W brushless motor offers powerful acceleration and reliable performance on trails.

highlights.title: Extended Range Battery
highlights.description: Ride longer with a lithium battery capable of delivering up to 65 KM on a single charge.

highlights.title: Multi Ride Modes
highlights.description: Choose Eco, Standard, or Sport depending on terrain and riding style.

features.title: Bright Digital Dashboard
features.description: Clear LED display showing speed, battery level, ride mode, and trip data.

features.title: Quick Swap Battery System
features.description: Easily remove the battery for indoor charging and convenient transport.

features.title: Durable Off-Road Tires
features.description: Designed to grip loose dirt, gravel, and rugged terrain with confidence.

highlights.description: High efficiency brushless motor delivering powerful acceleration and stable off-road performance.
